name: MCDMapECUParamToSysVariableRead
title: MCDMapECUParamToSysVariableRead
syntax: long MCDMapECUParamToSysVariableRead(char moduleName[], char parameterName[], SysVarName)
description: Maps an ECU parameter to a system variable so that it the system variable changes whenever the parameter is updated. The MCD data acquisition must already be started.

parameters.name: moduleName
parameters.description: Name of the module that is configured in the global options dialog External Programs|MCD 3D Server.
